original_image_tags: Back of an off-white, aged paper envelope. A rusted metal paperclip is attached to the upper left edge. Handwritten in pencil or pen vertically along the center crease is a case or reference number.

elements.description: The back of a white envelope with visible flap seams, minor creasing, a small dark staple or clip mark on the left edge, and handwritten numerical text vertically along the center (67-83894-592).

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: the back of an envelope, a fastener on the left edge, and handwritten numerical text vertically along the center.
